items.title: New Linux 'Copy Fail' Vulnerability Enables Root Access on Major Distributions
items.summary:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a Linux local privilege escalation (LPE) flaw that could allow an unprivileged local user to obtain root.
The high-severity vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-31431 (CVS...

items.title: Critical cPanel and WHM bug exploited as a zero-day, PoC now available
items.summary: The critical CVE-2026-41940 authentication bypass vulnerability in cPanel, WHM, and WP Squared is being actively exploited in the wild and has been leveraged in attempts since late February. [...]
